jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ustraa - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!
